hero.subtitle: Premium knives, swords, and custom engraving. Over 20 years of helping you find the perfect blade — for any purpose, any budget.

about.label: Our Story
about.title: More Than A Store
about.subtitle: For over 20 years, we've been the Panhandle's destination for premium blades. Whether you need a hunting companion, a kitchen workhorse, or a collector's piece — we have it, and we'll show you exactly how it works.

products.label: Premium Collection
products.title: Damascus Steel
products.desc: Hand-forged Damascus blades with unique patterns. Every piece is one of a kind — as strong as it is beautiful.

products.label: Kitchen
products.title: Chef's Collection
products.desc: Professional-grade kitchen knives for every culinary task. From chef's knives to cleavers — the brands chefs trust.

products.label: Battle Ready
products.title: Swords & Blades
products.desc: Functional battle-ready swords, movie replicas, and collector pieces. Kill Bill, historical, and fantasy blades.

products.label: Custom
products.title: Personal Engraving
products.desc: Make it truly yours. Custom engraving on knives, swords, and tools. Perfect for gifts, milestones, and keepsakes.

whyUs.label: The Difference
whyUs.title: Why The Knife Guys
whyUs.subtitle: You can buy a knife anywhere online. But you can't feel it in your hand, test the weight, or ask an expert — until now.

steps.title: Try Before You Buy
steps.desc: Put it in your pocket, see how it feels. Walk around the store. We don't rush you — the right knife chooses you.

steps.title: Expert Guidance
steps.desc: 20+ years of hands-on knowledge. We'll show you the differences in function, build, and metal — not just the price tag.

steps.title: Custom Orders
steps.desc: Don't see what you need? If it's a brand we carry, we can order it. Special requests welcome — just ask.

steps.title: On-Site Engraving
steps.desc: Custom engraving at both locations. Birthdays, military, corporate gifts — make any blade a one-of-a-kind piece.

testimonials.text: Best knife store in the Panhandle, hands down. They took the time to show me exactly what I needed for elk hunting. Not just selling — educating.
testimonials.author: Mike R.

testimonials.text: Got my husband's anniversary knife engraved here. They did an incredible job and had it ready faster than expected. The craftsmanship is unreal.
testimonials.author: Sarah T.

testimonials.text: I've been coming here for years. They carry brands you can't find anywhere else in the area, and they actually know what they're talking about.
testimonials.author: James K.

faq.a: We carry Benchmade, Case, William Henry, Buck, Kershaw, Gerber, CRKT, Cold Steel, and many more. If it's a brand we carry but we don't have it in stock, we can order it for you.
Yes! Custom engraving is available at both locations. We engrave knives, swords, tools, and more. Perfect for birthdays, military gifts, corporate awards, and wedding party gifts.

faq.q: Can I try a knife before buying?
faq.a: Absolutely. We encourage it. Put it in your pocket, see how it feels, test the weight and grip. We want you to be confident in your choice before you buy.

faq.q: Can you order something you don't have in stock?
faq.a: If it's a brand we carry, yes. Just let us know what you're looking for and we'll get it ordered. We can't source every knife in the world, but we'll always try.
We're open Monday through Saturday, 10 AM to 7 PM. Closed Sundays. Both locations keep the same hours.

faq.q: Do you sell fantasy swords and movie replicas?
faq.a: Yes — we carry functional battle-ready swords, movie replicas (Kill Bill, and more), and fantasy pieces. These are real quality items, not cheap wall hangers.
